name: sleeper-league-data
description: Auto-refreshing data pipeline for Borehamwood Plancy fantasy league

scripts.build: node scripts/build-lore.js && node scripts/build-alltime.js && node scripts/build-artifact.js
scripts.refresh: node scripts/fetch-history.js && node scripts/fetch-rosters.js && node scripts/fetch-stats.js && node scripts/fetch-fc-values.js && node scripts/fetch-trades.js && node scripts/build-lore.js && node scripts/build-alltime.js && node scripts/build-artifact.js && node scripts/validate.js
